/CAL SENTENCING/X DEFENDANT WAIVES THE REQUIREMENT FOR A PRE-SENTENCE REPRT,/AJW/CH5:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 46 D/CTS:46/WS/IND/WEAP/PPRF/CTORD: THAT THEDEFENDANT MUST COMPLETE ONE (1) YEAR OF ELECTRONIC  MONITORING (TO BE MONITORED BY APD) AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION W/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/CTORD:THAT THE FOLLOWING FEES ARE WAIVED OR STAYED/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD:THAT THEDEFENDANT MUST PAY THE FOLLOWING/PC/RESTV/COLLECT/X:THE DEFENDANT HAVING ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER IN COURT 19016506 & 20002830 IS ORDERED TO PAY RESTITUTION & ABIDE BY ANY STAY-AWAY ORDERS AS DETERMINED BY APD,/SA2:TENDERLOIN AREA BOUNDED BY GEARY, POWELL, TAYLOR & MARKET  STREETS; AND MARKET STREET BETWEEN 6TH & 7TH STREETS, SAN FRANCISCO/SA3:150 YARDS FROM INTERSECTIONOF 16TH & MISSION STREETS, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD/OBEY/ACCEP/VD:PHC OF 04-08-2020/CONTD:M30 FOR PPRF COMPLIANCE ON 05-08-20/DOPU:APD/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTORD:SPANISH/INTC/X:COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MANTI HENRIQUEZ IS PRESENT TO PROVIDE BACKUP INTERPRETER SERVICES,/X:ALLAN TSIKERMAN A CERTIFIED LAW STUDENT, PRESENT, UNDER SUPERVISION OFADA JOHN DELGADO/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER BRIAN DONAHUE, SAN FRANCISCO POLICEDEPARTMENT/EXHMA:DEF E - WITNESSES BODY WORN CAMERA VIDEO (0 - 34 SEC ONLY)  DEPICTING ARREST OF DEFENDANT EDWARD ALMENDARES,/X:HAVING BEEN PREVIOUSLY MARKED, PEO'S EXHIBITS 4 AND 5 ARE ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE EXCEPT FOR THE PAPER IDENTIFIED AS  REPORT OF ANALYST , THE WRITING ON THE INTERNAL BAGGIES IS ACCEPTED THOUGH NOT FOR THE TRUTH OF WHAT IS WRITTEN,/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS IS HEARD BY THE COURT,/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/HTA1:1, 2, 3, 4/X:DEFENDANT SHALL REMAIN OUT OF CUSTODY IN THIS MATTER AS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED,/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/X:THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO PRESERVING THEIR RESPECTIVE EXHIBITS FOR POSSIBLE FUTURE REVIEW,/
